profile.name: Jean Carlos Murillo Vásquez
profile.headline: Full-Stack Software Engineer | .NET | React | SQL | AI-Enabled Solutions
profile.summary: Experienced and versatile Full-Stack Software Engineer with over 10 years in the IT industry, with a strong focus on .NET development, SQL, and data engineering. Proven ability to design and develop scalable web applications, RESTful APIs, and data-driven solutions across cloud and on-premises environments. Experienced in building end-to-end systems, integrating backend services, databases, and modern web technologies. Strong communicator with experience collaborating with product managers, architects, and stakeholders to deliver high-quality, production-grade software solutions.
highlights: .NET and SQL engineering
AI and RAG integrations
Cloud and DevOps delivery
Power Platform consulting

feedItems.title: Professional Summary
feedItems.body: Full-Stack Software Engineer with 10+ years of experience building scalable web applications, RESTful APIs, data-driven platforms, and end-to-end business solutions across cloud and on-premises environments.

feedItems.title: AI and Data Engineering Focus
feedItems.body: Hands-on experience integrating Large Language Models, Retrieval-Augmented Generation architectures, ETL pipelines, data lakes, SQL optimization, and analytics-driven systems using modern engineering practices.

feedItems.title: Cloud, DevOps, and Delivery
feedItems.body: Experienced with Azure, AWS, GCP, CI/CD pipelines, Infrastructure as Code, production deployments, monitoring, and collaboration with architects, product managers, and stakeholders.

widgets.title: Primary Stack
widgets.description: .NET, ReactJS, SQL Server, Azure, RESTful APIs, and enterprise integration work.

widgets.title: AI and Automation
widgets.description: LLM integration, RAG solutions, prompt engineering, Copilot-assisted workflows, and Power Platform delivery.

widgets.title: Availability
widgets.description: Open to full-stack engineering, consulting, integration, and cloud modernization work.

experience.summary: Able to build RESTful APIs and backend services using .NET (C#) for financial and transactional integrations. Implemented AI-driven features using Large Language Models such as Claude and GPT-4. Built Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) solutions by integrating external data sources to enhance AI responses.
highlights: Able to build RESTful APIs and backend services using .NET (C#) for financial and transactional integrations.
Implemented AI-driven features using Large Language Models such as Claude and GPT-4.
Built Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) solutions by integrating external data sources (e.g., SharePoint, databases) to enhance AI responses.
Leveraged tools like GitHub Copilot to improve development speed and code quality.
Able to design and develop API integrations for BCCR, enabling secure communication and financial data exchange.
Able to implement database connectivity and data synchronization between distributed POS terminals using SQL Server and MySQL.
Capable of designing and optimizing relational databases, stored procedures, and queries for high-volume transactional environments.
Able to set up CI/CD pipelines and manage cloud deployments using Vercel and Google Cloud Platform (GCP).
Capable of managing production environments, domain configuration, maintenance, and bug fixes.
Able to apply Agile methodologies and continuous testing practices to ensure code quality and reliability.

experience.summary: Able to design, implement and maintain CI/CD pipelines using GitHub Actions and Azure DevOps. Able to develop Azure Functions and build custom SDK integrations for Power Platform using .NET (C#).
highlights: Able to design, implement and maintain CI/CD pipelines using GitHub Actions and Azure DevOps.
Able to develop Azure Functions and build custom SDK integrations for Power Platform using .NET (C#).
Able to build RESTful APIs and backend services using .NET (C#) for financial and transactional integrations.
Capable of automating cloud infrastructure provisioning in Azure using Terraform (Infrastructure as Code).
Capable of applying DevOps best practices to improve system security, performance and operational stability.
Able to implement monitoring, logging and alerting solutions using Azure Monitor, Prometheus, Grafana and ELK Stack.
Capable of performing troubleshooting and root cause analysis across development, test and production environments.
Able to continuously improve deployment processes to increase efficiency, quality and release velocity.
Capable of working with containerized applications and microservices architectures using Docker and Kubernetes.

experience.summary: Designed full-stack web applications with .NET, Java, and ReactJS. Led CI/CD integration through Azure DevOps and delivered enterprise integrations with SQL and web services.

Led CI/CD integration through Azure DevOps.

SQL developer.

Able to write requirements documents. Technical skills: C#, SQL, Javascript.Net core, Net Framework, Bootstrap.

experience.summary: Capable of leading technical design and implementation of enterprise Data Lake solutions, big data pipelines, and data-driven web applications across cloud-enabled environments.
highlights: Capable of leading the technical design and implementation of enterprise Data Lake solutions using SQL Server, Cosmos DB, MongoDB, SSIS, and Apache Spark.
Able to design and maintain big data pipelines and data processing workflows for large-scale data ingestion, transformation, and analytics.
Capable of developing data-driven web applications and data models using .NET, ReactJS, and Erwin.
Able to build RPA automation solutions using UiPath and integrate CI/CD pipelines using Azure DevOps and Jenkins.
Capable of defining system architecture, technical designs, and implementation strategies based on business and technical requirements.
Able to guide development teams and collaborate with Project Managers, Business Analysts, and stakeholders throughout the project lifecycle.
Capable of implementing coding standards, architectural best practices, and ensuring high-quality code across the project.
Able to perform system analysis, integration testing, and end-to-end validation for enterprise data platforms.
